title: Survival Reworked
description: ⭐ Improved and optimized Vanilla+ survival: better performance, better visuals, better gameplay — without breaking Minecraft.
body: Click [HERE](https://discord.gg/qepmmDDD6Y) or scan the QR code below to join my discord server: ![Joindiscord.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53064d65d5826e56875823f8fc6ed2271cb2c107.jpeg) ## ⚠️you can contact me if you need help, or if the modpack doesn't work, or if you need help : **Contact me** # 🎯 Modpack Objective **Offer a more complete, immersive, and user-friendly survival experience without invasive mods or extreme changes.** **You’ll get Minecraft… but better: smoother, more readable, and more alive.** ## ⚙️ Main Features: ## ✔ Quality of Life (QOL) **- Instant harvesting (Sneak with any axe to harvest tree and right click to harvest wheat tomato or other) with automatic replanting** - **Full tree cutting (sneak with any axe) and configurable vein-mining** - **Synchronized double-door opening** - **Quick access to recipes (in inventory)** - **Improved HUD: immersive hotbar, centered crosshair, optimized bars** - **Automatic client mod management** ## ✔ Enhanced but Vanilla-Faithful Gameplay🕹️ - **Expanded cooking** - **Hardcore ally revival** - **Natural vegetation interactions** ## ✔ Improved Exploration and Navigation🗺️ - **Elegant minimap** - **Advanced lodestone-based location systems** ## ✔ Graphics and Optimization🏞️ **Thanks to [iris shaders](https://www.irisshaders.dev/download)** ![https://www.irisshaders.dev/download](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5fdaafb66269d6632e85b3d13cfdc1c6ee7c6441.png) **✨the pack supports shaders for realistic lighting and atmosphere.💡** ## Maximized performance with modern APIs 🔌 **Fabric API** **Architectury API** **Cloth Config API** **Forge Config API Port** **Fabric Language Kotlin** **Lighting, shadows, and water gain depth without impacting performance.** ## 🎨 Integrated Resource Packs 📦 **Dark, readable interfaces** **Discreet shield for better visibility** **Stylized 3D models for certain items** ## ⭐ Why Download This Modpack? 🌟 **For a smoother, more enjoyable, and immersive survival experience** **For a better-designed experience while staying faithful to vanilla Minecraft** **For top performance even on modest hardware** **For a complete, clean, balanced pack with no cheat mods or forbidden files** **For a modern, visually stunning vanilla+ experience**
